name: benchclaw-stage1-dag
principle: Non-serial DAG scheduled by ready set. Nodes 05 and 06 are external capability-document inputs. Node 13 depends only on node 12.

nodes.name: idea-intake
nodes.purpose: Freeze the user's benchmark idea and boundary assumptions as the Stage1 input baseline.

nodes.name: intent-understanding
nodes.purpose: Extract evaluation targets, capability intent, boundaries, exclusions, and ambiguity from the idea.

nodes.name: query-rewrite
nodes.purpose: Rewrite the interpreted intent into search queries and literature-discovery strategy.

nodes.name: intent-expansion-doc
nodes.purpose: Expand the intent into a structured design document for later capability and template work.

nodes.name: useful-literature-search
nodes.purpose: Search and screen useful literature candidates without turning them into final claims yet.

nodes.name: data-simulator-capability-description
nodes.purpose: Read data and simulator capability cards to summarize available sources, GT fields, and constraints.

nodes.name: annotation-capability-description
nodes.purpose: Read annotation-tool capability cards and summarize I/O, confidence, limitations, and call constraints.

nodes.name: literature-analysis-report
nodes.purpose: Turn candidate literature into benchmark-design evidence for capability decomposition and template design.

nodes.name: capability-decomposition-doc
nodes.purpose: Combine intent, literature, simulator/data capability, and annotation capability into measurable capability dimensions.

nodes.name: initial-template-metric-set
nodes.purpose: Derive initial templates, evidence contracts, metrics, and template-to-capability mapping.

nodes.name: simulator-selection
nodes.purpose: Select executable simulators based on capability dimensions and simulator support.

nodes.name: annotation-tool-selection
nodes.purpose: Select automatic or semi-automatic annotation tools based on capability needs and tool constraints.

nodes.name: benchmark-draft
nodes.purpose: Merge nodes 00 through 11 into the benchmark design draft.

nodes.name: execution-plan
nodes.purpose: Generate the executable Stage2 to Stage4 handoff plan from the benchmark draft.
